programmes.show_description: May is keen to make a career move to a bigger station, but both Jack and Cecil are set against her going and both try to apply for a transfer to be near her. S1 E8: Job Opportunity
A hectic stag night causes Gary to wake up late for his wedding. Will he make it on time? Will he be there at all? S4 E9: Heartaches
Mr. Bean wreaks havoc at Harrods when he goes Christmas shopping, then has trouble stuffing a turkey on Christmas Day. E7: Merry Christmas, Mr. Bean
The team must venture into dangerous territory when a fellow officer is found dead, and Alex's whole perspective on the world of 1981 is threatened when she is kidnapped. S2 E1
Sandra likes her boss Derek; Carol hates her job but doesn't want to offend Sandra by leaving. Derek then makes Carol an offer that leaves Sandra very jealous... S8 E2: The Flower-Picker
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Where Malcolm takes Brenda to Chester, she plays second fiddle to a piece of furniture that he is returning for his mother. S1 E3: Outing
Dorien's book group is convening to discuss Crime and Punishment, which turns out to be rather applicable to the events that unfold in Tracey's household. S11 E5: Tracey's Choice
It turns our that Mr. Bean isn't very good at looking after things in a laundrette, and he later has difficulty keeping control of his ball during a round of mini golf. E12: Tee Off, Mr. Bean
David refuses to go with Amy to visit the ruins by saying that he already booked a court to play tennis with Linda; Robert still does not suspect, but Amy finally sees the evidence. S1 E6: Forty Love

Mrs Boswell is rushed to hospital after a day out with her friend Derek. Meanwhile, Grandad receives a visit from Lilo Lill. S8 E5
Sandra is not looking forward to Christmas, so Carol sends cards to Sandra from people she knows. Will Carol cheer her up, or will it make it worse? S7 E9: It Insists on Coming Once a Year
Jack and May have problems with their teenage daughter, and it's dance night and Ethel is excited about hoping to find love at last. S1 E9: Sleeping Around
Lady Lavender's money goes astray and she calls in the police. Will her money turn up at the bishop's auction inside one of the Meldrum vases? S2 E4 The Meldrum Vases
When George has a nasty cold and gives it to Robin, Chrissy and Jo try to make him better using a range of home-made remedies. S1 E6: Match of the Day
Jamila has been arrested for shoplifting. Mr. Brown gathers the class and they set out to return the items without getting caught. That'll be a tricky one. S1 E5: The Best Things in Life
Alf is charged to look after the Christmas club subscriptions at the pub. Unfortunately maths is not his strong point and he struggles to balance the books. S6 E6: Christmas Club Books
Sandra is not looking forward to Christmas, so Carol sends cards to Sandra from people she knows. Will Carol cheer her up, or will it make it worse? S7 E9: It Insists on Coming Once a Year
Mrs Boswell is rushed to hospital after a day out with her friend Derek. Meanwhile, Grandad receives a visit from Lilo Lill. S8 E5
A local property developer offers to buy Arthur's lock-up and car lot, but Terry suspects that the deal is bent and turns to DS Jones for help. S7 E6: The Wrong Goodbye
Jack and May have problems with their teenage daughter, and it's dance night and Ethel is excited about hoping to find love at last. S1 E9: Sleeping Around
Gary is alarmed when he discovers that Ron has divulged his time-travelling escapades to Kate, Yvonne's journalist friend. S4 E10: Careless Talk
More hilarious mishaps with the bumbling Mr. Bean, this time as he books into a hotel room and makes himself well and truly at home but locks himself out. E8: Mr. Bean in Room 426
The team is on the hunt for major vehicle thief Jed Wicklow; when a car chase leads to his death, Gene stands accused of causing it through reckless driving. S2 E2
Sandra likes Derek; she would marry him and start a family with him, but he doesn't know she has feelings for him. Carol is worried for her mum's health. S8 E3: You've No Idea What I've Been Through
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Terry tries to intervene on Malcolm's behalf, but Brenda confuses him as to which sister is which. S1 E4: Confusing
Tracey is out of prison, and Sharon gets a job as a school dinner supervisor and recruits Garth as her cook and Tracey as her washer-up. S11 E6: The Chief, The Cook, His Mum and Her Lodger
More mayhem with hapless bumbler Mr. Bean as he struggles to wait in line for an appointment and thinks up some unusual methods to help him sleep. E13: Goodnight Mr. Bean
With their affair now exposed, Linda and David plan to run off together - Robert wants to fight David, but Amy decides to foil their plan. S1 E7: Hasta La Vista

The Boswell family try to cope without Mum, who has some surprise visitors - her 'fancy man' Derek and Lilo Lill. S8 E6
Sandra finds Carol work in kennels after she is fired from the biscuit factory, but Carol may not be best suited to animals when some go missing. S8 E1: Something Beginning
The Minister for Transport is on his way to visit the station, but disaster awaits as there is no milk left at the train's buffet for his cup of tea! S2 E1: No Milk For The Minister
Alf tells Sir Ralph that Lord Meldrum can't be having an affair with Lady Agatha because he was wounded in the Royal Artillery. S2 E5 The Wounds of War
Robin is conned by his friend Larry into looking after a puppy but has to hide it from George - who operates a No Animals rule - until he can find a new home for it. S1 E7: No Children, No Dogs
It's Mr. Brown's birthday. It's not all happy returns when Ms. Courteney informs Mr. Brown that his trial month is over and she is not satisfied with his teaching. S1 E6: Come Back All Is Forgiven
Else sends a letter inviting everyone to Australia - everyone but Alf, that is. S6 E7: The Letter
Sandra finds Carol work in kennels after she is fired from the biscuit factory, but Carol may not be best suited to animals when some go missing. S8 E1: Something Beginning
The Boswell family try to cope without Mum, who has some surprise visitors - her 'fancy man' Derek and Lilo Lill. S8 E6
After Terry goes missing, Arthur Daley returns with his nephew Ray in tow as his new minder - and ambitions to expand into the European market. S8 E1: The Loneliness of the Long Distance Entrepreneur
